uplink.description: fPort 1, format v01, RTC scheduled uplink: all sensors populated, in-range climate + light + accelerometer
uplink._note: expected derived from upstream TTN decoder (vendor/n-fuse/stx.js) then mapped to vocabulary: hdc2080.temperature->air.temperature, hdc2080.humidity->air.relativeHumidity, sfh7776.luminance(lux)->air.lightIntensity, info.battery(V)->battery; bma400 axes/txpower/version/trigger->camelCase extras

uplink.description: fPort 1, format v01, light-above-threshold trigger: max luminance (14-bit), txpower index 1, different climate/accelerometer
uplink._note: expected derived from upstream TTN decoder (vendor/n-fuse/stx.js); luminance 0x3fff=16383 lux confirms the SFH7776 lux range maps to air.lightIntensity
expected derived from upstream TTN decoder: decodeUplink asserts fPort == 1

uplink.description: format-version guard: odd bytes[0] is rejected (upstream precedence quirk bytes[0] & 0xc0 != 0x40)
uplink._note: expected derived from upstream TTN decoder: the version guard evaluates as (bytes[0] & 1) due to JS operator precedence, ported verbatim
